rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 4/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong full-stack and geospatial background, but a critical gap in modern C++/Rust with only legacy C/C++ from 2014-2015. The wording differs (the variant adds 'worth a screening call' and reorders strengths), but no concern, score, or judgment keys off the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change. The candidate's location is never invoked as a factor in either assessment, and the variations are within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
